transcript:
Good afternoon, Abu Dhabi. Yeah, uh, I'm Emily. Uh, I'm the mother of bbSOL. The Bybit Staked SOL, which was also the first centralized exchange backed SOL LST, which we launched last year together with our partner Sanctum. Yeah, so before anything else, yeah, a big shout out to our dear partner Sanctum. Yeah, okay, so seriously, uh, I'm Emily, the Head of Spot at Bybit and also the Founder of Byreal. So yes, uh, I am building a Solana native DEX inside a CEX. Yeah, so, uh, yesterday I'm not sure if you heard Ben and Lily's fireside chat, uh, it's our CEO and Co-founder of Bybit. Um, yeah, so they introduced the big picture. Uh, I also feel the pressure, uh, they they had a big expectation for, uh, Byreal. Uh, I feel a little bit like, uh, Asian parents kind of style tough love. Yeah, um, so today I gonna introduce you, uh, how exactly we are building this Byreal DEX.

Okay. So for years, we been told and we thought and were trading like TradFi, CeFi, and DeFi are parallel lines, they will never meet. But if you look at this year, in 2025, look at this timeline. It looks a little bit crowded. Uh, that's because it is. Yeah, oh this year really killed us. A lot of things happened and a lot of products shift. So in mid-June, uh, Bybit launched TradFi products, allowing users to trade Forex, Gold, Stock CFDs. And that is, you know, on the surface you would think that is just a products offering expansion. But internally we take it like a signal of the convergence. So global assets meet the crypto-native market. Right. And then very soon, at the end of June, 30th June, xStocks tokens launch on Solana. And that on the same day, Byreal mainnet beta went life. So that is shows our commitment. I introduced a, what I call, Full House Launch. So xStocks was the first projects, the assets we listed on DEX listing on Byreal, and at the same time on Bybit Spot. So this show our commitment to convergence. Yeah. Uh, we want to, uh, allowing the users to trade, like just, uh, like like a CEX grade experience, like the on-chain tokens. Right.

And also, uh, we, sorry, wait a minute, a little bit nervous. Yeah. Um, yeah, like actually like we said, like this is our commitment to the convergence. Uh, we are proving that internet capital markets starts on-chain on Solana, validated by DeFi, the DEX like Byreal, and further scaled by CeFi, CEX like Bybit. So that is the full story. And then shift to, uh, August 7th. Uh, that we further break the wall. We broke the wallet wall. Like Ben mentioned yesterday, we had a very hard decision. We decided to delist the Bybit, old Bybit Web3 wallet. Because, uh, we thought, okay, all the users on Bybit, uh, even then they want to trade DEX or get access to the DeFi protocols, they should enjoy the same experience that they trade the other products on Bybit with one single unified trading account. So that's why we decided to delist the the Web3 wallet. And instead, we list the Bybit Alpha. The where the users can just trade the on-chain tokens, the SPL tokens seamlessly with their unified trading account. Not just with USDT or USDC, also with their SOL and bbSOL. So that is the start.

And then, at the end of September, Byreal went to pu— public fully. We made the announcement at Solana Apex Singapore. Yeah, uh, very proud of that. Um, so we decided to focus on the RWA, Real World Assets, and the hero projects tokens listing. Right. So if we look at the the performance, like where we achieved after the public launch. So according to, uh, DeFiLlama, uh, and according to Birdeye, uh, actually Byreal is dominating the, uh, the trading volume of Tether Gold on Solana chain. Which means on Byreal, the XAUt trading volume and the liquidity is the best. And for the major hero projects token listing, we successfully deli— delivered four more Full House Launch projects. First was World Liberty Fi, and followed by Double Zero, Monad, Meteora token, and Humidify tokens. So which means this the t— the tokens will list on centralized, uh, sorry, list on Byreal first, and then Bybit Alpha, and Bybit Spot almost around the same time. So you can unlock the better liquidity and bigger trading volume.

Yeah, and more importantly, more importantly, yeah, uh, bbSOL gains the institutional custody support from Anchorage Digital. So which means, it this really matters. Which means the convergence is not just driven by the retails. The institutions is also very comfortable like holding Solana native, CEX backed assets on-chain. Yeah. And we are not just extracting the value from the ecosystem. Actually, by this convergence, us as a centralized exchange, we are using our infrastructure, our liquidity, our user base, to further amplify what is just started on-chain right now. Yeah. And we not just stop, uh, like building the innovation features. Right. So last month, in November, uh, Byreal we introduced the feature called Real Farmer. Which means, it's called, it's similar like copy trading, but it's kind of like copy farming to the LPs. So all the users, everyone can provide liquidity on-chain like pros. By this, we will further boost the liquidities on DeFi and then will further amplify on the CeFi.

Okay. Uh, so I'll just show our secret sauce. Okay, so when I mentioned there's some like Full House Launch tokens, you may notice, so these tokens, the LP yields is always a little bit higher on Byreal. That is because we taking the orders, uh, not just from the DEX but also from the, uh, Bybit Alpha. So this is our secret sauce. So you don't need to leave the CEX. You can just enjoy your familiar CEX environment and you can earn the yields, uh, on-chain, on DeFi natively from Solana liquidity. I just show you a, uh, uh, the video. Okay. How we build this.

[Video plays showing Byreal app features: Tailor a collateralized loan, use your Bybit UTA account to borrow more tokens, Bybit Alpha upholds Market Making Democracy, Every user can contribute liquidity and become a Market Maker, Simplified Gas fee: automatically convert gas tokens, Supports liquidity pools such as USDT, USDC, SOL, xStocks, XAUt on Solana, with better depth, price stability, and smaller unpredictable losses. Safety: Prevents sniping and interception, eliminates fake tokens. Monitor performance anytime inside your UTA. And Easy to Redeem without using a third party pool. Your liquidity position is now live. The first CEX Liquidity Farm is live!]

Okay. Yeah, let's go back to that crowded timeline. So if we zoom out, yeah, this is not just about the features. I think this is about like we see the liquidity started moving across, uh, TradFi, CeFi, and DeFi freely. Yeah, so I think like if we still building a products just for the crypto-natives or just for the institutions, then we are building a world like no longer exists. Right. So we believe the next billion transactions will fully by convergence. And also we think the next trillion transactions will come on-chain, happen on DeFi, and then powered by TradFi.

So before I go, actually I want to get a personal moment, uh, personal for a moment. Uh, this is my second Breakpoint. Um, I actually I started and initiated Solana collaboration within Bybit, uh, since December 2023. Uh, and then attended my first Breakpoint last year Singapore. And I was shocked, I was amazed by, you know, the good energy and the Solana builder culture. So I had the idea, uh, of this Byreal, uh, this early this year around like, uh, February. And we shaped to the beta launch in June and we make the debut at Solana Apex Budapest. And then we open to all, uh, in the end of September and we announced it at Solana Apex Singapore. And in December, for now, I'm standing here at Breakpoint bringing a real products. And actually we just hit 1 billion trading volume in total for Byreal, yeah, just two days ago. Yeah. It just happened within 10 weeks after the public launch. Yeah, I feel quite, uh, exciting and very proud of my tiny tiger team. Yeah, um, so it is feel very emotional a little bit. Uh, but, uh, we always say everything move fast in crypto. But I learned one thing by building Byreal: everything is faster on Solana. Yeah, I'm Emily. Yeah, and this is Byreal. Thank you so much. Hope to see you again next year at Solana Breakpoint.

By[Lara O'Reilly](https://www.businessinsider.com/author/lara-oreilly)

Oura CEO Tom Hale is eyeing the company's next big opportunity.Shauna Clinton/Sportsfile for Web Summit via Getty Images

SaveSaved[Read in app](https://insider-app.onelink.me/4cpG/?af_js_web=true&af_ss_ver=2_3_0&af_dp=insider://bi/post/oura-ring-health-payments-digital-id-ceo-tom-hale-2025-11&af_force_deeplink=true&is_retargeting=true&deep_link_value=https://www.businessinsider.com/oura-ring-health-payments-digital-id-ceo-tom-hale-2025-11&pid=businessinsider&c=post_page_share_bar_v2_smart_4.13.23)

* Oura plans to expand its smart ring into digital payments, keys, and identity tools.
* CEO Tom Hale sees biometric wearables as a solution for secure authentication and payments.
* Integrating NFC chips into small wearables remains an engineering challenge, Hale acknowledged.
Oura, the maker of smart rings[beloved by athletes](https://www.businessinsider.com/oura-ring-fitness-tracker-pros-cons-after-years-wearing-style-2025-1)and celebrities, has said it's on course to generate $1 billion in revenue this year. Now it's setting its sights beyond fitness and[health tracking](https://www.businessinsider.com/guides/tech/best-smart-rings)as it looks to capture its next billion-dollar opportunity.
Speaking to Business Insider at the Web Summit tech conference in Lisbon this month, Oura CEO Tom Hale outlined a vision to expand into areas like digital identity and payments.
"The idea is very straightforward: What if this is your key? What if this is your wallet?" Hale said of the company's smart rings, which retail for up to $499.
Hale said there's a lot of friction within enterprises when it comes to validating identity —from office workers remembering their passwords when they log on to their computers, to those with clearance to operate weapons systems getting access to the control room.
"This is a biometric wearable that can identify you," Hale said.
Hale didn't give a timeline for when such features might be brought to the device.
"We're not suddenly going to become an identity provider," Hale said. "It's an additional value of biometric identification and payments as an application."
Oura first signaled its intent to move into the authentication space in 2023, when it acquired the identity technology provider Proxy in an all-equity deal. At the time, Oura said the deal gave it the opportunity to exp

editorial.headline: Bybit’s Byreal Bridges CEX Liquidity to Solana Mainnet
editorial.standfirst: The "DEX inside a CEX" hybrid model hits $1B volume in 10 weeks, proving the convergence of institutional capital and on-chain speed is finally here.
key_takeaways: Byreal exceeds $1B trading volume just 10 weeks after its public launch.
Anchorage Digital now provides institutional-grade custody for bbSOL.
New "Full House Launch" model ensures immediate liquidity parity for assets like Monad and Humidify.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The era of segregated liquidity is over. **Bybit** has effectively erased the line between centralized and decentralized exchange infrastructure with **Byreal**, a Solana-native DEX embedded directly within its institutional platform. The project, led by Emily Bao, has validated its "convergence" thesis with hard numbers: hitting $1 billion in total trading volume just 10 weeks after its public debut. This isn't just another interface; it represents a structural shift where the deep liquidity of a top-tier CEX is funneled directly into on-chain order books.

This integration is powered by what Bao calls the "Full House Launch" strategy. Instead of the traditional lag between on-chain generation and centralized listing, Byreal synchronizes liquidity events across **Bybit Spot**, **Bybit Alpha**, and the Solana mainnet simultaneously. This mechanism has already been deployed for high-profile assets including **World Liberty Financial**, **Monad**, and **Humidify**, allowing traders to access unified liquidity pools without the typical fragmentation that plagues early token lifecycles. The model effectively creates a "super-orderbook" that services both degenerate on-chain farmers and risk-averse institutional desks.

Critically, the infrastructure is being fortified for institutional capital. **Anchorage Digital** has been confirmed as the custodian for **bbSOL** (Bybit Staked SOL), a move that provides the regulatory air cover necessary for large-scale asset managers to enter the Solana ecosystem. Combined with the successful June rollout of **xStocks**—which brought tokenized equities like Gold and Stock CFDs on-chain—Byreal is positioning itself not merely as a trading venue, but as a comprehensive internet capital market where RWA and crypto-native assets trade with equal frictionlessness.
